zh.lifeSummary: Ralph de Cromwell於大約1240年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾。他和Mazere Marmion至少有1個兒子。他去世於1289年9月18日之前在英國英格蘭德比夏爾韋斯特 哈勒姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph de Cromwell was born about 1240, in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Mazere Marmion. He died before 18 September 1289, in West Hallam, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Ralph de Cromwell est né environ 1240, à Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mazere Marmion. Il est décédé avant 18 septembre 1289, à West Hallam, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Ralph de Cromwell wurde um 1240 in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Mazere Marmion mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 18. September 1289 in West Hallam, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Ralph de Cromwell è nato il circa 1240 nel Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mazere Marmion. Morì prima del 18 settembre 1289, nel West Hallam, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Cromwellは約1240年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエルで生まれた。彼はMazere Marmionとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1289年9月18日以前にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアウエスト ハラムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Cromwell(은)는 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 크롬웰에서 태어났다. 그는 Mazere Marmion(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1289년 9월 18일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 웨스트 핼램에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ralph de Cromwell nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mazere Marmion. Ele faleceu antes 18 de setembro de 1289, em West Hallam, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Ralph de Cromwell родился около 1240 г. в местности кромвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mazere Marmion. Он умер перед 18 сентябрь 1289 г. в местности вест холлэм, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
